name: Battlin' Boxer Rib Gardna
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＫ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バーニングナックラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> リベージ・ガードナー
desc: During either player's turn: You can banish this card from your hand or Graveyard, then target 1 "Battlin' Boxer" monster you control; banish it until your next Standby Phase.
mnst_eff: During either player's turn: You can banish this card from your hand or Graveyard, then target 1 "Battlin' Boxer" monster you control; banish it until your next Standby Phase.
eff: During either player's turn: You can banish this card from your hand or Graveyard, then target 1 "Battlin' Boxer" monster you control; banish it until your next Standby Phase.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
